note: Customer and vehicle information redacted. Dealer form layouts preserved from actual deal paperwork.

sections.title: REG 262 — Vehicle transfer & reassignment
sections.description: California DMV bill of sale, odometer disclosure, and buyer/seller signatures.

sections.title: REG 51 — Report of sale (used vehicle)
sections.description: Dealer and DMV copies of the used vehicle report of sale.

sections.title: Title reassignment (sample layout)
sections.description: Prior-state title and dealer reassignment pages from the deal jacket.

sections.title: REG 396 — Wholesale report of sale
sections.description: Wholesale odometer disclosure and dealer-to-dealer report of sale.

sections.title: REG 31 — Verification of vehicle
sections.description: VIN verification form and California BTM reference codes.

sections.title: Smog Check — Vehicle inspection report
sections.description: California smog inspection results form (layout sample).

sections.title: Retail installment contract — Page 1
sections.description: Truth-in-lending disclosures, insurance statement, and vehicle description.

sections.title: Retail installment contract — Page 2
sections.description: Itemization of amount financed, optional products, and trade-in details.

sections.title: Retail installment contract — Page 3
sections.description: Finance charge, payments, security interest, and default provisions.

sections.title: Retail installment contract — Page 4
sections.description: Repossession, warranties, credit reporting, and servicing contacts.

sections.title: Retail installment contract — Page 5
sections.description: Seller's right to cancel and arbitration provision.

sections.title: Retail installment contract — Page 6
sections.description: Insurance notice, buyer acknowledgements, guaranty, and assignment.

sections.title: California language acknowledgement
sections.description: Confirms the language in which the contract was negotiated.

sections.title: Due bill — work & accessories
sections.description: Promised reconditioning, accessories, and as-is disclosures at time of sale.

sections.title: FTC Buyer's Guide (window form)
sections.description: Federal used-vehicle warranty disclosure — front and back.

sections.title: Agreement to provide insurance
sections.description: Insurance requirements, coverage checkboxes, and loss payee block.

sections.title: Pre-contract disclosure (California)
sections.description: Optional goods and services listed before you sign the installment contract.

sections.title: Contract cancellation option agreement
sections.description: Two-day cancellation option for eligible used vehicle purchases under California law.
